creator: sepron@gmail.com
text:
This bug is also related to:
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-net/2009-March/021345.html
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-net/2009-March/021518.html

I've experienced the same problem with:
FreeBSD 7.1-RELEASE-p1 and p2
FreeBSD 7.0-RELEASE-p9 and p10
FreeBSD 6.4-RELEASE-p3
